data.title: OpenAI Takes A Page From Google's 2007 Playbook, Turns Phones Into AI Hotlines With 1-800-CHATGPT
data.description: OpenAI has launched a toll-free service, 1-800-CHATGPT, allowing users to access ChatGPT for free with a 15-minute monthly call, echoing Google's 2007 GOOG-411 initiative.

data.title: CVS Faces DOJ Lawsuit Alleging Violations Of Controlled Substances Act And False Claims Act Over Opioid Prescriptions
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice filed a civil complaint against CVS Pharmacy Inc owned by CVS Health Corp, alleging the nation's largest pharmacy chain violated the Controlled Substances Act by filling unlawful prescriptions for dangerous opioid combinations and quantities from 2013 onwards.

data.title: Apple Reportedly In Talks With Tencent, TikTok-Parent ByteDance To Roll Out AI Features In China
data.description: The potential collaboration with Tencent and ByteDance is critical for Apple as it navigates the competitive Chinese market.

data.title: Wharton's Jeremy Siegel Calls Stock Sell-Off A 'Healthy' Reality Check: 'Market Was Overly Optimistic'
data.description: The Federal Reserve's recent decision to cut interest rates by 0.25% was widely anticipated, marking the third consecutive reduction in borrowing costs.

data.title: EV Battery Maker CATL Eyes 2nd Listing In Hong Kong To Raise $5 Billion Or More: Report
data.description: Chinese electric vehicle battery manufacturer Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. or CATL is reportedly considering a second listing in Hong Kong.
